div.p: Please select both Department and Project from the filters above to view the dashboard details.

div.t-if: state and !state.loading and state.selectedDepartment and state.selectedProject

div.div:
Sec 4(i) Notification of intention to prospect
/

button.t-on-click.stop: () => this.openFirstPending('bhu.sia.team', state.stats && state.stats.sia_info ? state.stats.sia_info.first_pending_id : false, state.stats && state.stats.sia_info ? state.stats.sia_info : null)
button.title: Approve First Pending

button.t-on-click.stop: () => this.openFirstPending('bhu.sia.team', state.stats && state.stats.sia_info ? state.stats.sia_info.first_pending_id : false, state.stats && state.stats.sia_info ? state.stats.sia_info : null)
button.title: Return First Pending

t.t-esc: this.getStepNumber('Sec 7(i) Notification of intention to acquire land', 'Step 2')

div.span: Sec 7(i) Notification of intention to acquire land

button.t-on-click.stop: () => this.openFirstPending('bhu.section4.notification', state.stats && state.stats.section4_info ? state.stats.section4_info.first_pending_id : false, state.stats && state.stats.section4_info ? state.stats.section4_info : null)
button.title: Approve First Pending

button.t-on-click.stop: () => this.openFirstPending('bhu.section4.notification', state.stats && state.stats.section4_info ? state.stats.section4_info.first_pending_id : false, state.stats && state.stats.section4_info ? state.stats.section4_info : null)
button.title: Return First Pending

button.t-on-click.stop: () => this.openFirstPending('bhu.expert.committee.report', state.stats && state.stats.expert_info ? state.stats.expert_info.first_pending_id : false, state.stats && state.stats.expert_info ? state.stats.expert_info : null)
button.title: Approve First Pending

button.t-on-click.stop: () => this.openFirstPending('bhu.expert.committee.report', state.stats && state.stats.expert_info ? state.stats.expert_info.first_pending_id : false, state.stats && state.stats.expert_info ? state.stats.expert_info : null)
button.title: Return First Pending

button.t-on-click.stop: () => this.openFirstPending('bhu.section11.preliminary.report', state.stats && state.stats.section11_info ? state.stats.section11_info.first_pending_id : false, state.stats && state.stats.section11_info ? state.stats.section11_info : null)
button.title: Approve First Pending

button.t-on-click.stop: () => this.openFirstPending('bhu.section11.preliminary.report', state.stats && state.stats.section11_info ? state.stats.section11_info.first_pending_id : false, state.stats && state.stats.section11_info ? state.stats.section11_info : null)
button.title: Return First Pending

button.t-on-click.stop: () => this.openFirstPending('bhu.section11.preliminary.report', state.stats && state.stats.section11_info ? state.stats.section11_info.first_pending_id : false, state.stats && state.stats.section11_info ? state.stats.section11_info : null)
button.title: Approve First Pending

button.t-on-click.stop: () => this.openFirstPending('bhu.section11.preliminary.report', state.stats && state.stats.section11_info ? state.stats.section11_info.first_pending_id : false, state.stats && state.stats.section11_info ? state.stats.section11_info : null)
button.title: Return First Pending

button.t-on-click.stop: () => this.openFirstPending('bhu.section15.objection', state.stats && state.stats.section15_info ? state.stats.section15_info.first_pending_id : false, state.stats && state.stats.section15_info ? state.stats.section15_info : null)
button.title: Approve First Pending

button.t-on-click.stop: () => this.openFirstPending('bhu.section15.objection', state.stats && state.stats.section15_info ? state.stats.section15_info.first_pending_id : false, state.stats && state.stats.section15_info ? state.stats.section15_info : null)
button.title: Return First Pending

button.t-on-click.stop: () => this.openFirstPending('bhu.section19.notification', state.stats && state.stats.section19_info ? state.stats.section19_info.first_pending_id : false, state.stats && state.stats.section19_info ? state.stats.section19_info : null)
button.title: Approve First Pending

button.t-on-click.stop: () => this.openFirstPending('bhu.section19.notification', state.stats && state.stats.section19_info ? state.stats.section19_info.first_pending_id : false, state.stats && state.stats.section19_info ? state.stats.section19_info : null)
button.title: Return First Pending

button.t-on-click.stop: () => this.openFirstPending('bhu.section15.objection', state.stats && state.stats.section15_info ? state.stats.section15_info.first_pending_id : false, state.stats && state.stats.section15_info ? state.stats.section15_info : null)
button.title: Approve First Pending

button.t-on-click.stop: () => this.openFirstPending('bhu.section15.objection', state.stats && state.stats.section15_info ? state.stats.section15_info.first_pending_id : false, state.stats && state.stats.section15_info ? state.stats.section15_info : null)
button.title: Return First Pending

button.t-on-click.stop: () => this.openFirstPending('bhu.section19.notification', state.stats && state.stats.section19_info ? state.stats.section19_info.first_pending_id : false, state.stats && state.stats.section19_info ? state.stats.section19_info : null)
button.title: Approve First Pending

button.title: Return First Pending

t.t-esc: this.getStepNumber('Asset Survey Committee Formation', (state.isCollector or state.isAdmin) ? 'Step 10' : 'Step 9')

button.t-on-click.stop: () => this.openFirstPending('bhu.section21.notification', state.stats && state.stats.draft_award_info ? state.stats.draft_award_info.first_pending_id : false, state.stats && state.stats.draft_award_info ? state.stats.draft_award_info : null)
button.title: Approve First Pending

button.t-on-click.stop: () => this.openFirstPending('bhu.section21.notification', state.stats && state.stats.draft_award_info ? state.stats.draft_award_info.first_pending_id : false, state.stats && state.stats.draft_award_info ? state.stats.draft_award_info : null)
button.title: Return First Pending

span.title: Pending — filed amount below voucher total
